response.text:
## 📋 8 measurement Commands Found

---

### **1. MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:EDGEQUALONE**

**📋 Description:** This command set or queries the measurement 1 input edge qualifier one source fo

**📖 Details:** This command set or queries the measurement 1 input edge qualifier one source for Efficiency measurement.

**⚙️ Syntax:** `MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:EDGEQUALONE  <QString>`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7
---

### **2. MEASUrement:REFLevels:JITTERMODE**

**📋 Description:** This command sets or queries how often reference levels are calculated on Jitter

**📖 Details:** This command sets or queries how often reference levels are calculated on Jitter measurements. If the mode is set to Latch, ref levels are calculated only on the first acquisition after a statistics reset. If it is set to Continuous, reference levels are calculated on every acquisition.

**⚙️ Syntax:** `MEASUrement:REFLevels:JITTERMODE  {CONTinuous|LATCh}`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7
---

### **3. MEASUrement:CLOCKRecovery:ADVanced:METHod**

**📋 Description:** This command sets or queries the global advanced clock recovery method. This wil

**📖 Details:** This command sets or queries the global advanced clock recovery method. This will affect measurements whose :MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:CLOCKRecovery:GLOBal flag is set to 1.

**⚙️ Syntax:** `MEASUrement:CLOCKRecovery:ADVanced:METHod  {NONE|NOMinal|PATTern}`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7
---

### **4. MEASUrement:CLOCKRecovery:METHod**

**📋 Description:** This command sets or queries the global clock recovery method for the measuremen

**📖 Details:** This command sets or queries the global clock recovery method for the measurement. This will affect measurements whose :MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:CLOCKRecovery:GLOBal flag is set to 1.

**⚙️ Syntax:** `MEASUrement:CLOCKRecovery:METHod  {PLL|CONSTANTCLOCK|EXPLICITCLOCK}`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7
---

### **5. MEASUrement:REFLevels:ABSolute:HYSTeresis**

**📋 Description:** This command sets or queries the value of the hysteresis of the reference level

**📖 Details:** This command sets or queries the value of the hysteresis of the reference level when the measurement's ref level method is set to absolute.

**⚙️ Syntax:** `MEASUrement:REFLevels:ABSolute:HYSTeresis <NRf>`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7
---

### **6. MEASUrement:REF<x>:REFLevels:ABSolute:HYSTeresis**

**📋 Description:** This command sets or queries the value of the hysteresis of the reference level

**📖 Details:** This command sets or queries the value of the hysteresis of the reference level when the measurement's ref level method is set to absolute.

**⚙️ Syntax:** `MEASUrement:REF<x>:REFLevels:ABSolute:HYSTeresis <NR1>`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7
---

### **7. MEASUrement:CLOCKRecovery:CLOCKMultiplier**

**📋 Description:** This command sets or queries the global clock multiplier used when explicit cloc

**📖 Details:** This command sets or queries the global clock multiplier used when explicit clock recovery is used for the measurement. This will affect measurements whose :MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:CLOCKRecovery:GLOBal flag is set to 1.

**⚙️ Syntax:** `MEASUrement:CLOCKRecovery:CLOCKMultiplier <NRf>`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7
---

### **8. MEASUrement:CLOCKRecovery:STAndard**

**📋 Description:** This command sets or queries the global communications standard used when PLL cl

**📖 Details:** This command sets or queries the global communications standard used when PLL clock recovery is used for the measurement. This will affect measurements whose :MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:CLOCKRecovery:GLOBal flag is set to 1.

**⚙️ Syntax:** `MEASUrement:CLOCKRecovery:STAndard {CUSTom| ENET100|FW1394BS400B| FW1394BS800B| FW1394BS1600B|  FBD1|  FBD2|FBD3|  FC133|  FC266|  FC531|  FC1063|  FC2125|  FC4250|FC8500| ENET1000| IBA2500| IBA_GEN2| OC1| OC3| OC12| OC48|PCIE_GEN1| PCIE_GEN2| PCIE_GEN3| RIO125| RIO250| RIO3125|SAS15_NOSSC| SAS3_NOSSC| SAS6_NOSSC| SAS12_NOSSC| SAS15_SSC|SAS3_SSC| SAS6_SSC| SAS12_SSC| SATA_GEN1| SATA_GEN2|SATA_GEN3| USB3| XAUI| XAUI_GEN2}`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7

---

- **🔍 Explain command:** "Explain command 3" 
- **➕ Add command:** "Add command 7 to my flow"
- **⚖️ Compare commands:** "Compare command 1 and 5"
- **📖 Get details:** "Tell me more about command 2"

**Which command interests you?**
